description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image with a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG that stores node_modules/. Define stages test and bundle, and a global before_script that runs npm install before every job. In the test stage add a test:lint job that runs npm run lint, and a test:unit job that uses the adimit/docker-node-chromium image and runs npm run test. In the bundle stage add a bundle:chromium job that runs npm run build:chromium then npm run bundle and publishes any .zip files as artifacts. Also add a bundle:firefox job that runs only on tags, executes npm run build:firefox then node_modules/web-ext/bin/web-ext sign -a . -s addon --api-key=${MOZILLA_USER} --api-secret=${MOZILLA_KEY} --id=${MOZILLA_ID}, and stores any .xpi files as artifacts.
